summary: Terms page successfully displays all required content including heading, effective date, section headings, and support contact. Visual implementation uses cream background card treatment with proper typography hierarchy. Minor palette drift from specified diner teal background represents polish variance but doesn't break functionality.

violations.description: Page uses cream background instead of specified diner teal #9fd8d2 for primary legal page canvas

actions: Consider updating page background to use diner teal #9fd8d2 as specified in manifesto for legal pages
Verify support email link functionality matches canonical support mailbox contract
